phase: Phase 6 — Vault-sharing tussen users LIVE: ECDH P-256 (WebCrypto native) + AES-GCM-wrapped private-key + zero-knowledge intact
kdf_in_use: AES-KDF (KDBX-spec-conform, KeePassXC-CLI oracle-verified). Argon2id-default deferred v1.0-Bernstein.

sharing.asymmetric: ECDH P-256 (WebCrypto native, geen externe lib)

mfa.magic_link: 32-byte urlsafe token, 10 min, single-use via Gmail SMTP_SSL

account_security.pw_change: POST /auth/password — vereist oude-pw-verificatie + nieuwe-pw min 12 chars

next_version_planned: 0.0.7-Bellare (Phase 7 — productie-deploy HorseCloud55 + nginx + systemd + Let's Encrypt + smoke-tests)
